settingsPage.aboutDescription: A modern, web-based PLC programming environment supporting Ladder Logic (LD) and Structured Text (ST).
settingsPage.serverDeployDesc: Upload and start plc-agent on the target board via SSH.
settingsPage.noBoardSelected: Please select a board first (create or open a project).

blockInfo.TON: Timer On-Delay. When IN=TRUE timing starts; Q=TRUE after PT has elapsed. ET shows elapsed time. Resets when IN=FALSE.
blockInfo.TOF: Timer Off-Delay. Q goes FALSE after PT elapses since IN fell to FALSE. ET shows elapsed time.
blockInfo.TP: Timer Pulse. Rising edge on IN starts a fixed-duration pulse of PT on Q. Q cannot be extended during the pulse.
blockInfo.TONR: Retentive On-Delay. ET accumulates while IN=TRUE and holds when IN=FALSE. Q=TRUE when ET≥PT. RESET clears ET.
blockInfo.CTU: Count Up. Rising edge on CU increments CV. Q=TRUE when CV≥PV. R resets CV to 0.
blockInfo.CTD: Count Down. Rising edge on CD decrements CV. Q=TRUE when CV≤0. LD loads PV into CV.
blockInfo.CTUD: Count Up/Down. CU increments, CD decrements CV. QU=TRUE when CV≥PV, QD=TRUE when CV≤0. R resets, LD loads PV.
blockInfo.SR: Set-Reset Latch. S1=TRUE sets Q1, R=TRUE resets Q1. S1 has priority when both are TRUE.
blockInfo.RS: Reset-Set Latch. S=TRUE sets Q1, R1=TRUE resets Q1. R1 has priority when both are TRUE.
blockInfo.R_TRIG: Rising Edge Detector. Q=TRUE for exactly one scan when CLK transitions FALSE→TRUE.
blockInfo.F_TRIG: Falling Edge Detector. Q=TRUE for exactly one scan when CLK transitions TRUE→FALSE.
blockInfo.GT: Greater Than. Q=TRUE when IN1 > IN2. Accepts any numeric type (INT, DINT, REAL…).
blockInfo.GE: Greater or Equal. Q=TRUE when IN1 ≥ IN2. Accepts any numeric type.
blockInfo.EQ: Equal. Q=TRUE when IN1 = IN2. Accepts any numeric type.
blockInfo.NE: Not Equal. Q=TRUE when IN1 ≠ IN2. Accepts any numeric type.
blockInfo.LE: Less or Equal. Q=TRUE when IN1 ≤ IN2. Accepts any numeric type.
blockInfo.LT: Less Than. Q=TRUE when IN1 < IN2. Accepts any numeric type.
blockInfo.ADD: Addition. OUT = IN1 + IN2. Accepts any numeric type (INT, DINT, REAL…).
blockInfo.SUB: Subtraction. OUT = IN1 − IN2. Accepts any numeric type.
blockInfo.MUL: Multiplication. OUT = IN1 × IN2. Accepts any numeric type.
blockInfo.DIV: Division. OUT = IN1 ÷ IN2. Integer division truncates toward zero. Accepts any numeric type.
blockInfo.MOD: Modulo. OUT = IN1 mod IN2. Remainder of integer division. Integer types only (INT, DINT…).
blockInfo.MOVE: Move / Assign. OUT = IN. Copies the value unchanged. Accepts any numeric type.
blockInfo.ABS: Absolute Value. OUT = |IN|. Returns the non-negative magnitude. Accepts any numeric type.
blockInfo.SQRT: Square Root. OUT = √IN. IN must be ≥ 0. REAL input and output.
blockInfo.EXPT: Exponentiation. OUT = IN ^ EXP. Both inputs and output are REAL.
blockInfo.MAX: Maximum. OUT = max(IN1, IN2). Returns the larger of the two values. Any numeric type.
blockInfo.MIN: Minimum. OUT = min(IN1, IN2). Returns the smaller of the two values. Any numeric type.
blockInfo.LIMIT: Limit / Clamp. OUT = clamp(IN, MN, MX). Ensures MN ≤ OUT ≤ MX. Any numeric type.
blockInfo.BAND: Bitwise AND. OUT = IN1 AND IN2, applied bit-by-bit. DWORD operands.
blockInfo.BOR: Bitwise OR. OUT = IN1 OR IN2, applied bit-by-bit. DWORD operands.
blockInfo.BXOR: Bitwise XOR. OUT = IN1 XOR IN2, applied bit-by-bit. DWORD operands.
blockInfo.BNOT: Bitwise NOT. OUT = NOT IN, inverts all 32 bits. DWORD operand.
blockInfo.SHL: Shift Left. OUT = IN shifted left by N bit positions. Zeros fill from the right. DWORD input, USINT shift count.
blockInfo.SHR: Shift Right. OUT = IN shifted right by N bit positions. Zeros fill from the left. DWORD input, USINT shift count.
blockInfo.ROL: Rotate Left. Rotates all bits of IN left by N positions (wrap-around). DWORD input, USINT count.
blockInfo.ROR: Rotate Right. Rotates all bits of IN right by N positions (wrap-around). DWORD input, USINT count.
blockInfo.SIN: Sine. OUT = sin(IN). IN is angle in radians. REAL input and output.
blockInfo.COS: Cosine. OUT = cos(IN). IN is angle in radians. REAL input and output.
blockInfo.TAN: Tangent. OUT = tan(IN). IN is angle in radians. REAL input and output.
blockInfo.ASIN: Arc Sine. OUT = asin(IN) in radians. IN must be in [−1.0 .. 1.0]. REAL.
blockInfo.ACOS: Arc Cosine. OUT = acos(IN) in radians. IN must be in [−1.0 .. 1.0]. REAL.
blockInfo.ATAN: Arc Tangent. OUT = atan(IN) in radians. Output is in [−π/2 .. π/2]. REAL.
blockInfo.SEL: Binary Select. G=FALSE → OUT = IN0; G=TRUE → OUT = IN1. Any numeric type.
blockInfo.MUX: Multiplexer. K selects the output: K=0→IN0, K=1→IN1. K is USINT; inputs are any numeric type.
blockInfo.NORM_X: Normalize. Maps VALUE from the range [MIN..MAX] linearly to [0.0..1.0]. All inputs and output are REAL.
blockInfo.SCALE_X: Scale. Maps VALUE from [0.0..1.0] linearly to the range [MIN..MAX]. All inputs and output are REAL.
blockInfo.REAL_TO_INT: Converts REAL to an integer type by truncating toward zero (e.g. 3.9 → 3, −3.9 → −3).
